name: PaperlessBillingSetUp
description: Customer wants to switch from paper billing to electronic billing (ebilling), or is reporting that they've already switched to ebilling but are still receiving paper bills. This is not about requesting a copy of a bill or changing payment details.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want to switch to ebilling
How do I stop getting paper bills?
Set me up with electronic billing please
Can I go paperless on my account?
I don't want paper bills anymore
Switch my billing to email instead of post
I want my bills sent by email not through the letterbox
How do I turn off paper billing?
I've already signed up for ebilling but I'm still getting paper bills
I switched to ebilling months ago and the paper ones keep coming
Can you confirm I'm set up for paperless billing?
I keep receiving paper bills even though I opted for digital
Stop sending me letters — I want everything online
Is there an option to get my bill by email?
Go paperless
I'd prefer digital bills rather than paper ones
How do I opt in to ebilling?
My paper bills are a waste — put me on ebilling
I thought I was on ebilling but a paper bill just arrived
Can you check if my account is set to paperless?
